tests.description: createPointCloud({ useVoronoiShader: true }) initialises without error and adds Points to scene
Voronoi-enabled ShaderMaterial has uVoronoiGridSize uniform with numeric value
draw() updates uVoronoiGridSize to a value reflecting structureComplexity (range 3.0–6.0)
draw() with high trebleEnergy does not throw (treble consumed in shader only)
createPointCloud({ useVoronoiShader: false }) does NOT have uVoronoiGridSize uniform
setOpacity works on voronoi-configured point cloud
Voronoi ShaderMaterial fragmentShader contains uVoronoiGridSize, gl_PointCoord, and F2 (voronoi second-distance)
Voronoi fragment shader does NOT contain noise3d patterns (snoise/fbm3) — self-contained
QualityProfile for low tier has enableVoronoiCells === false
QualityProfile for high tier has enableVoronoiCells === true
Voronoi fragment shader contains fog uniforms (uFogNear, uFogFar) and vDepth varying for depth fog
Voronoi fragment shader contains uBassEnergy and uTrebleEnergy uniforms for audio reactivity
Voronoi fragment shader uses vColor varying for palette-derived coloring
Voronoi-enabled point cloud cleanup disposes geometry and material
All uniform values remain finite after draw with extreme audio params on voronoi point cloud
No localStorage or cookie access with voronoi shader enabled
